name: groweasy-csv-importer
description: AI-powered CSV importer that maps arbitrary CSV layouts into GrowEasy CRM records.

scripts.dev: pnpm build:shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter backend start" "pnpm --filter frontend start"
scripts.test: cd backend && pnpm exec jest --passWithNoTests && cd ../frontend && pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.lint: cd backend && pnpm exec eslint "src/**/*.ts" && cd ../frontend && pnpm exec eslint "src/**/*.{ts,tsx}"
